experience.title: Freelance Cloud Consultant & System Administrator
details: Designed and managed multi-cloud infrastructures across AWS, Azure, GCP, and DigitalOcean with secure and optimized configurations.
Implemented Cloudflare CDN, Zero-Trust, and secure tunneling solutions to enhance system performance and access security.
Led cyber-attack mitigation, incident response, and recovery operations ensuring high availability and minimal downtime.
Containerized and deployed applications using Docker, improving portability, reliability, and operational efficiency.

experience.title: General Manager
details: Oversaw end-to-end web administration, ensuring secure, high-performance website operations.
Produced and edited multimedia content to strengthen organizational outreach and engagement.
Managed social media strategy, increasing brand visibility and audience reach across platforms.

experience.title: DevOps Intern under IHRD
details: Administered Linux servers, ensuring secure, stable, and optimized operational environments.
Strengthened network security through firewall policies, vulnerability assessments, and access controls.
Containerized internal applications using Docker to streamline deployment and improve reliability.
Developed and enhanced CI/CD workflows using GitHub Actions, enabling fully automated builds and testing.

experience.title: Technical Lead
details: Architected and deployed a self-hosted server stack to run APIs with minimal infrastructure cost.
Led development contributions to automated WhatsApp Bot systems for campus productivity.

projects.title: Project Haajar
projects.description: A smart College Management System with a frontend in Flutter and ReactJS. The backend relies on Appwrite, hosted on PiCloud v1.0.

projects.title: PiCloud
projects.description: A self-hosted server architecture utilizing a home LAN connection and Raspberry Pi technology to securely host web applications via Cloudflare Zero Trust.

projects.title: Transit Master
projects.description: Co-developed an urban mobility solution featuring an NFC-enabled smart card system for efficient public transportation.

projects.title: LAN Based Media Controller
projects.description: A project that helps to control a PC's running multimedia (Play/Pause/Next/Previous/Volume control) over a local network.

projects.title: Smart Drip Irrigation System
projects.description: Created an IoT-based automation device for a drip irrigation system with Google Assistant integration.

projects.title: Customized Alexa (COVID-19)
projects.description: Installed and customized Alexa answers for college purposes and a voice-assisted room automation system during lockdown.

education.degree: B. Tech. Computer Science and Engineering ( 2020 - 2024 )
education.institution: College of Engineering Attingal, Affiliated to KTU

recognition.title: Project Expos
recognition.details: Recognized for PiCloud and Transit Master at Global Science Festival Kerala (2024), Keraleeyam (2023), KSUM IEDC Summit (2023), and Freedom Fest (2023).

recognition.title: Publications
recognition.details: Documentary Editor for 'Kerala: The Coasts That Once Was.' by Manav Prakriti Foundation. Zenodo. doi:10.5281/zenodo.18919264.
